name: Fawad Khan
bio: Fawad Afzal Khan is a Pakistani actor, singer, and model. He is one of the most popular and highest-paid actors in Pakistan. He began his career as a singer with the band Entity Paradigm and later transitioned to acting. He is widely recognized for his roles in Humsafar and Zindagi Gulzar Hai, which became landmark productions in Pakistani television history.

bio: Mahira Khan is a Pakistani actress and former VJ. She is one of the most popular and highest-paid actresses in Pakistan. She gained widespread recognition through her role in Humsafar opposite Fawad Khan. She later appeared in Bollywood film Raees alongside Shah Rukh Khan.

bio: Nargis is a popular Pakistani film actress known for her bold roles and comedic performances in Lollywood films. She has appeared in numerous Pakistani films and is known as one of the most entertaining personalities in the Pakistani film industry with a huge fan following.

bio: Imran Khan is a Pakistani actor and model who has appeared in numerous drama serials. He is known for his natural acting style and strong screen presence. He has built a solid reputation in Pakistani television through his consistent performances in drama serials across major channels.

name: Ali Rehman
bio: Ali Rehman is a Pakistani actor known for his charming personality and versatile performances in drama serials. He has appeared in numerous hit dramas and continues to be one of the most sought-after young actors in Pakistani television with a strong and dedicated fan base.

name: Sunita Marshal
bio: Sunita Marshal is a Pakistani Christian actress known for her diverse roles in drama serials. She has appeared in numerous successful productions and is recognized for her versatility and dedication. She is married to actor Wayne Marshall and is known for breaking stereotypes in Pakistani entertainment.
awards: HUM Award Best Supporting Actress Nomination

name: Amitabh Bachchan
bio: Amitabh Bachchan is the biggest superstar in Indian cinema history known as the Shehenshah of Bollywood. He has appeared in over 200 films spanning six decades and has won four National Film Awards. He is considered a living legend of world cinema.

name: Shah Rukh Khan
bio: Shah Rukh Khan known as King Khan is the biggest romantic hero in Bollywood history. He has appeared in over 80 films and is one of the wealthiest actors in the world. He is known for iconic romantic films like Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge and Kuch Kuch Hota Hai.

name: Salman Khan
bio: Salman Khan known as Bhai is one of Bollywoods biggest action superstars. He has appeared in over 100 films and hosts the popular reality show Bigg Boss. He is known for his blockbuster films like Bajrangi Bhaijaan and the Dabangg series.

name: Aamir Khan
bio: Aamir Khan known as Mr Perfectionist is one of Bollywoods most acclaimed actors. He is known for choosing meaningful films like Lagaan Taare Zameen Par and Dangal. He has won multiple National Film Awards.

name: Deepika Padukone
bio: Deepika Padukone is Bollywoods highest paid actress and one of the most recognizable Indian celebrities globally. She has appeared in numerous blockbusters including Om Shanti Om and Pathaan. She is also known for her mental health advocacy.

name: Priyanka Chopra
bio: Priyanka Chopra is a global icon who successfully crossed over from Bollywood to Hollywood. She starred in the American TV series Quantico and is a former Miss World. She is one of the most influential women in the world.

name: Ranveer Singh
bio: Ranveer Singh is one of Bollywoods most energetic and versatile actors known for his powerful performances in Padmaavat Gully Boy and 83. He is known for his bold fashion choices and electrifying screen presence.

name: Ranbir Kapoor
bio: Ranbir Kapoor is one of Bollywoods finest actors known for his intense performances in Rockstar Barfi and Sanju. He is considered one of the most talented actors of his generation and son of veteran actor Rishi Kapoor.

name: Alia Bhatt
bio: Alia Bhatt is one of Bollywoods brightest young stars known for her powerful performances in Udta Punjab Raazi and Gangubai Kathiawadi. She made her Hollywood debut in Heart of Stone and is married to actor Ranbir Kapoor.

name: Katrina Kaif
bio: Katrina Kaif is one of Bollywoods most popular actresses known for her stunning looks and blockbuster films including the Tiger franchise with Salman Khan. She is married to actor Vicky Kaushal.

name: Hrithik Roshan
bio: Hrithik Roshan known as the Greek God of Bollywood is known for his exceptional looks and dancing abilities. He delivered blockbusters like Kaho Na Pyaar Hai Krrish and War. He is considered one of the finest dancers in Indian cinema.

name: Akshay Kumar
bio: Akshay Kumar known as Khiladi Kumar is one of Bollywoods most prolific stars. He is known for action films and patriotic blockbusters like Kesari and Mission Mangal. He holds a black belt in martial arts.

name: Kareena Kapoor
bio: Kareena Kapoor Khan is one of Bollywoods most iconic actresses known for versatile roles in Jab We Met 3 Idiots and Veere Di Wedding. She is married to actor Saif Ali Khan.

name: Kangana Ranaut
bio: Kangana Ranaut is one of Bollywoods most acclaimed actresses known for powerful performances in Queen Tanu Weds Manu and Manikarnika. She has won four National Film Awards.
awards: National Film Award Best Actress 4 times

name: Vidya Balan
bio: Vidya Balan is one of Bollywoods finest actresses known for women-centric films like Kahaani The Dirty Picture and Shakuntala Devi. She has won the National Film Award for Best Actress.

name: Taapsee Pannu
bio: Taapsee Pannu is one of Bollywoods most respected actresses known for powerful performances in socially relevant films like Pink Thappad and Badla.

name: Ayushmann Khurrana
bio: Ayushmann Khurrana is known for choosing unconventional films like Vicky Donor Andhadhun and Bala. He has won the National Film Award for Best Actor and is known for films that challenge social taboos.

name: Rajkummar Rao
bio: Rajkummar Rao is one of Bollywoods most acclaimed actors known for method acting and powerful performances in Shahid Trapped and Newton. He has won the National Film Award for Best Actor.

name: Irrfan Khan
bio: Irrfan Khan was one of the greatest actors in Indian cinema who achieved massive international recognition appearing in Slumdog Millionaire The Amazing Spider-Man and Jurassic World. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor and passed away in 2020.

name: Nawazuddin Siddiqui
bio: Nawazuddin Siddiqui is one of the finest actors in Indian cinema known for raw powerful performances in Gangs of Wasseypur Raman Raghav 2.0 and Sacred Games. He rose from humble beginnings to become one of the most respected actors in world cinema.

name: Pankaj Tripathi
bio: Pankaj Tripathi is one of Bollywoods most beloved character actors known for his natural acting style. He became a household name through Mirzapur and has appeared in blockbusters like Stree and OMG 2.
awards: National Film Award Best Supporting Actor

name: Manoj Bajpayee
bio: Manoj Bajpayee is one of the greatest actors in Indian cinema known for landmark performances in Satya Gangs of Wasseypur and The Family Man. He has won multiple National Film Awards and is considered a legend of Indian parallel cinema.
awards: National Film Award Best Actor 3 times

name: Vicky Kaushal
bio: Vicky Kaushal is one of Bollywoods brightest young stars known for powerful performances in Uri The Surgical Strike and Sam Bahadur. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor for Uri and is married to actress Katrina Kaif.

name: Ajay Devgn
bio: Ajay Devgn is one of Bollywoods most versatile stars. He has won two National Film Awards and delivered blockbusters like Singham Tanhaji and Drishyam. He is known for his iconic entry in Phool Aur Kaante.

name: Kajol
bio: Kajol is one of Bollywoods most beloved actresses known for iconic romantic roles opposite Shah Rukh Khan in DDLJ and Kuch Kuch Hota Hai. She is considered one of the greatest actresses in Indian cinema history.

name: Madhuri Dixit
bio: Madhuri Dixit known as the Dhak Dhak Girl is one of the greatest actresses and dancers in Bollywood history. She delivered iconic performances in Tezaab Dil and Devdas. She is known for exceptional dancing skills.

name: Aishwarya Rai
bio: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan is a global icon and former Miss World considered one of the most beautiful women in the world. She is known for iconic roles in Devdas Jodhaa Akbar and Hum Dil De Chuke Sanam. She is married to Abhishek Bachchan.

name: Shahid Kapoor
bio: Shahid Kapoor is one of Bollywoods most versatile actors known for dancing skills and powerful performances in Haider Kabir Singh and Jersey. He is known for physical transformations for roles.

name: Tiger Shroff
bio: Tiger Shroff is Bollywoods biggest action star of the younger generation known for exceptional martial arts skills and acrobatic stunts. He has delivered blockbusters like Baaghi War and Heropanti.

name: Varun Dhawan
bio: Varun Dhawan is one of Bollywoods most popular young stars known for dancing skills and charming personality. He has delivered hits like Student of the Year Dilwale and Bhediya.

name: Shraddha Kapoor
bio: Shraddha Kapoor is one of Bollywoods most popular actresses known for blockbuster films and massive social media following. She delivered hits like Aashiqui 2 Baaghi and Stree 2.

name: Kartik Aaryan
bio: Kartik Aaryan is one of Bollywoods most popular young stars known for blockbuster films like Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2 and Satyaprem Ki Katha. He rose to fame with Pyaar Ka Punchnama.

name: Anushka Sharma
bio: Anushka Sharma is one of Bollywoods most successful actresses and producers. She delivered acclaimed performances in NH10 Sultan and Zero. She founded Clean Slate Filmz and is married to cricketer Virat Kohli.

name: Randeep Hooda
bio: Randeep Hooda is a versatile Indian actor known for intense performances and physical transformations. He appeared in Highway Sarbjit and directed Swatantrya Veer Savarkar. He is known for his dedication and powerful screen presence.

name: Sanjay Dutt
bio: Sanjay Dutt is a legendary Bollywood actor known for iconic roles in Munna Bhai Vaastav and Sadak. His life story was depicted in the biopic Sanju. He has delivered numerous blockbusters and is one of the most iconic figures in Indian cinema.

name: Sunny Deol
bio: Sunny Deol is a legendary Bollywood action hero known for powerful dialogue delivery and intense action sequences. He delivered iconic films like Gadar Damini and Border. His film Gadar 2 became one of the highest grossing Bollywood films ever.

name: Anil Kapoor
bio: Anil Kapoor is a legendary Bollywood actor who appeared in Hollywood productions including Slumdog Millionaire and Mission Impossible Ghost Protocol. He is known for his youthful looks and is one of the most respected veterans in Indian cinema.

name: Saif Ali Khan
bio: Saif Ali Khan is a National Award winning actor known for versatile performances in Omkara Dil Chahta Hai and Sacred Games. He is married to actress Kareena Kapoor and is the son of cricketer Mansoor Ali Khan Pataudi.

name: Kriti Sanon
bio: Kriti Sanon won the National Film Award for Best Actress for Mimi. She has delivered hits like Bareilly Ki Barfi Luka Chuppi and is one of the most followed Indian celebrities on social media.

name: Sidharth Malhotra
bio: Sidharth Malhotra is a popular Bollywood actor known for good looks and action films. He delivered hits like Shershaah and Mission Majnu and is married to actress Kiara Advani.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Male Debut Nomination

name: Kiara Advani
bio: Kiara Advani is one of Bollywoods most popular young actresses known for Kabir Singh Shershaah and Jugjugg Jeeyo. She is married to actor Sidharth Malhotra.

name: Bobby Deol
bio: Bobby Deol made a massive comeback with Animal and Aashram. He is known for reinventing himself as a powerful villain delivering one of Bollywoods most memorable villain performances in recent times.

name: Parineeti Chopra
bio: Parineeti Chopra is a talented Bollywood actress and cousin of Priyanka Chopra. She delivered acclaimed performances in Ishaqzaade and Amar Singh Chamkila. She is married to Raghav Chadha.

name: Nawazuddin Siddiqui
bio: Nawazuddin Siddiqui is one of the finest actors in Indian cinema known for raw powerful performances in Gangs of Wasseypur and Sacred Games. He rose from humble beginnings to become one of the most respected actors in world cinema.

name: Sara Ali Khan
bio: Sara Ali Khan is a popular young Bollywood actress and daughter of Saif Ali Khan. She made a powerful debut in Kedarnath and has appeared in hits like Simmba and Atrangi Re.

name: Janhvi Kapoor
bio: Janhvi Kapoor is a young Bollywood actress and daughter of legendary actress Sridevi. She made her debut in Dhadak and has appeared in Gunjan Saxena and Mili.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Female Debut Nomination

name: Jackie Shroff
bio: Jackie Shroff is a legendary Bollywood actor known for iconic roles in Hero Ram Lakhan and Parinda. He has appeared in over 200 films and is the father of actor Tiger Shroff.

name: Suniel Shetty
bio: Suniel Shetty is a veteran Bollywood action star known for powerful physique and action films like Mohra Border and Dhadkan. He has been a prominent figure in Bollywood for over three decades.

name: Dharmendra
bio: Dharmendra known as He-Man of Bollywood is a legendary Indian actor with career spanning six decades. He delivered iconic films like Sholay Satyakam and Phool Aur Patthar. He is the father of Sunny Deol and Bobby Deol.

name: Hema Malini
bio: Hema Malini known as the Dream Girl is a legendary Bollywood actress dancer and politician. She delivered iconic performances in Sholay Seeta Aur Geeta and Dream Girl. She is considered one of the greatest dancers in Indian cinema.

name: Abhishek Bachchan
bio: Abhishek Bachchan is a Bollywood actor and son of legendary Amitabh Bachchan. He has appeared in numerous hit films including Dhoom Guru and Bunty Aur Babli. He has been making a comeback with acclaimed performances in web series like Breathe.

name: Juhi Chawla
bio: Juhi Chawla is a beloved Bollywood actress known for her bubbly personality and iconic romantic comedies opposite Shah Rukh Khan in Darr and Yes Boss. She is also a producer and co-owner of Kolkata Knight Riders.

name: Rekha
bio: Rekha is a legendary Bollywood actress considered one of the greatest performers in Indian cinema history. She delivered iconic performances in Umrao Jaan Silsila and Khoon Bhari Maang. She is known for her timeless beauty and powerful acting.

name: Sridevi
bio: Sridevi was the first female superstar of Bollywood known for her iconic performances in Chandni Nagina and English Vinglish. She was known for her exceptional dancing skills and versatility. She passed away in 2018 and is considered one of the greatest actresses in Indian cinema history.

name: Amrita Singh
bio: Amrita Singh is a veteran Bollywood actress known for her powerful performances in Betaab and Chameli Ki Shaadi. She is the mother of actress Sara Ali Khan and was previously married to actor Saif Ali Khan. She is known for her bold and strong character roles.

name: Govinda
bio: Govinda is a legendary Bollywood comedian and dancer known for his exceptional comic timing and energetic dance moves. He delivered numerous blockbusters in the 1990s and is known for his comic films with David Dhawan. He is considered one of the greatest entertainers in Bollywood history.

name: Karisma Kapoor
bio: Karisma Kapoor is a National Award winning actress and sister of Kareena Kapoor. She delivered powerful performances in Dil To Pagal Hai Raja Hindustani and Zubeida. She is known for her versatile acting and was one of the biggest stars of the 1990s Bollywood.

name: Sonakshi Sinha
bio: Sonakshi Sinha is a popular Bollywood actress and daughter of veteran actor Shatrughan Sinha. She made her debut in Dabangg opposite Salman Khan and has appeared in numerous hit films. She is known for her bold personality and action roles.

name: Riteish Deshmukh
bio: Riteish Deshmukh is a popular Bollywood actor known for his comedy films and versatile performances. He has appeared in numerous hit comedies like Housefull and Ek Villain. He is also a qualified architect and is married to actress Genelia D Souza.

name: Genelia D Souza
bio: Genelia D Souza is a popular Bollywood actress known for her bubbly personality and romantic films. She delivered hits like Jaane Tu Ya Jaane Na and Force. She is married to actor Riteish Deshmukh and is known for her natural charm and acting abilities.

name: Arjun Kapoor
bio: Arjun Kapoor is a Bollywood actor and nephew of Anil Kapoor. He made his debut in Ishaqzaade and has appeared in numerous films. He is known for his action roles and has been working hard to establish himself as a versatile actor in Bollywood.

name: John Abraham
bio: John Abraham is a Bollywood action star and producer known for his exceptional physique and powerful action films. He delivered blockbusters like Dhoom Force and Pathaan. He is also known for producing meaningful films through his production company JA Entertainment.

name: Emraan Hashmi
bio: Emraan Hashmi known as the Serial Kisser is a popular Bollywood actor known for his thriller and romantic films. He delivered hits like Murder Gangster and the Jannat series. He has also appeared in the Netflix series Tiger 3 and is known for his unique genre of films.

name: Akshay Khanna
bio: Akshay Khanna is a talented Bollywood actor known for his powerful performances in Taal Dil Chahta Hai and Ittefaq. He is the son of legendary actor Vinod Khanna and is known for choosing meaningful and challenging roles throughout his career.

name: Bipasha Basu
bio: Bipasha Basu is a popular Bollywood actress and model known for her stunning looks and thriller films. She delivered hits like Raaz Jism and Dhoom 2. She is known for her fitness regime and is married to actor Karan Singh Grover.

name: Sushmita Sen
bio: Sushmita Sen is a former Miss Universe 1994 and popular Bollywood actress known for her powerful performances in Dastak and Main Hoon Na. She made a massive comeback through the web series Aarya and has won critical acclaim for her powerful portrayal.

name: Preity Zinta
bio: Preity Zinta is a popular Bollywood actress known for her dimpled smile and bubbly personality. She delivered acclaimed performances in Dil Se Veer Zaara and Koi Mil Gaya. She is also the co-owner of Punjab Kings IPL team.

name: Rani Mukerji
bio: Rani Mukerji is one of Bollywoods finest actresses known for her powerful performances in Black Yuva and Mardaani. She has won multiple Filmfare Awards and is known for her versatile acting range. She is married to director Aditya Chopra.

name: Dia Mirza
bio: Dia Mirza is a Bollywood actress model and former Miss Asia Pacific. She is known for her roles in Rehnaa Hai Terre Dil Mein and Sanju. She is also a UN Environment Programme Goodwill Ambassador and is very vocal about environmental issues.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Female Debut Nomination

name: Ameesha Patel
bio: Ameesha Patel is a Bollywood actress who made a massive debut opposite Hrithik Roshan in Kaho Na Pyaar Hai. She also starred in Gadar Ek Prem Katha which became one of the biggest blockbusters. She is known for her stunning looks and energetic performances.

name: Vivek Oberoi
bio: Vivek Oberoi is a Bollywood actor known for his powerful debut in Company and acclaimed performances in Saathiya and Yuva. He has also appeared in the web series Inside Edge. He is known for his intense acting style and strong screen presence.

name: Fardeen Khan
bio: Fardeen Khan is a Bollywood actor and son of legendary actor Feroz Khan. He made his debut in Prem Qaidi and delivered hits like Heyy Babyy and No Entry. He made a comeback after a long break with Visfot and is known for his charming looks.

name: Tusshar Kapoor
bio: Tusshar Kapoor is a Bollywood actor and son of veteran actor Jeetendra. He is known for his comedy films in the Golmaal and Kyaa Kool Hain Hum series. He is also a producer and has been in the industry for over two decades.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Male Debut Nomination

name: Rohit Roy
bio: Rohit Roy is a veteran Indian actor known for his popular TV serial Swabhimaan and numerous Bollywood films. He has appeared in both television and films throughout his career and is known for his charming screen presence and acting abilities.

name: Nana Patekar
bio: Nana Patekar is one of Indias greatest actors known for his intense and powerful performances. He delivered landmark roles in Parinda Krantiveer and Ab Tak Chhappan. He is known for his electrifying screen presence and is a National Film Award winner.

name: Naseeruddin Shah
bio: Naseeruddin Shah is one of Indias most acclaimed actors known for his powerful performances in art and commercial cinema. He has appeared in numerous critically acclaimed films and international productions. He is a recipient of the National Film Award and Padma Bhushan.

name: Om Puri
bio: Om Puri was one of Indias greatest character actors who appeared in both Indian and international films including East is East and Charlie Wilson War. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor and was known for his powerful and realistic performances. He passed away in 2017.

name: Amol Palekar
bio: Amol Palekar is a legendary Bollywood actor known for his everyman roles in films like Rajnigandha Chhoti Si Baat and Gol Maal. He is known for portraying the common middle class Indian man with great sensitivity. He later became a successful director of art films.

name: Mithun Chakraborty
bio: Mithun Chakraborty known as Disco Dancer is a legendary Bollywood actor who has appeared in over 350 films. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor for Mrigayaa and is known for his iconic disco films in the 1980s. He is also a politician and hotelier.

name: Sunny Leone
bio: Sunny Leone is a popular Bollywood actress and entrepreneur known for her glamorous image. She gained mainstream Bollywood exposure through Jism 2 and has appeared in numerous films and item numbers. She is also known for her business ventures and social media presence.

name: Radhika Apte
bio: Radhika Apte is one of Indias most versatile and critically acclaimed actresses known for her powerful performances across multiple languages. She gained international recognition through the Netflix anthology Lust Stories and Sacred Games. She is known for choosing bold and unconventional roles.

name: Konkona Sen Sharma
bio: Konkona Sen Sharma is one of Bollywoods most acclaimed actresses known for her powerful and nuanced performances. She delivered outstanding performances in Page 3 Mr and Mrs Iyer and A Death in the Gunj. She is the daughter of director Aparna Sen and has also directed a film.

name: Swara Bhasker
bio: Swara Bhasker is a talented Bollywood actress known for her powerful performances in Nil Battey Sannata Anaarkali of Aaraah and Veere Di Wedding. She is also known for her outspoken views on social and political issues and is considered one of the most progressive voices in Bollywood.

name: Kalki Koechlin
bio: Kalki Koechlin is a French-Indian actress known for her unconventional roles and powerful performances. She delivered acclaimed performances in Dev D That Girl in Yellow Boots and Margarita with a Straw. She is also a playwright and stage performer.

name: Richa Chadha
bio: Richa Chadha is a talented Bollywood actress known for her powerful performances in Gangs of Wasseypur Fukrey and Masaan. She is known for choosing bold and meaningful roles and has won critical acclaim for her versatile acting. She is married to actor Ali Fazal.

name: Ali Fazal
bio: Ali Fazal is a popular Bollywood actor who achieved international recognition through the Hollywood film Victoria and Abdul opposite Dame Judi Dench. He has appeared in Fukrey Mirzapur and various Bollywood films. He is married to actress Richa Chadha.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Supporting Actor Nomination

name: Divyanka Tripathi
bio: Divyanka Tripathi is one of Indias most popular television actresses known for her role in Yeh Hai Mohabbatein. She has won numerous television awards and is one of the highest paid TV actresses in India. She is married to actor Vivek Dahiya.

name: Jennifer Winget
bio: Jennifer Winget is one of Indias most popular and highest paid TV actresses known for her powerful performances in Beyhadh and Code M. She is known for her intense acting style and has won numerous television awards throughout her successful career in Indian television.

name: Hina Khan
bio: Hina Khan is a popular Indian actress known for her role as Akshara in Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai. She has appeared in Bigg Boss and has also worked in Bollywood films. She is known for her fashion sense and social media presence and has a massive fan following.

name: Mohit Raina
bio: Mohit Raina is a popular Indian actor known for his iconic portrayal of Lord Shiva in Devon Ke Dev Mahadev. He later appeared in the web series Uri and Mumbai Diaries. He is known for his intense screen presence and has won numerous awards for his television performances.

name: Pratik Gandhi
bio: Pratik Gandhi rose to national fame through the web series Scam 1992 where he played Harshad Mehta. His performance was widely praised and considered one of the finest acting performances in Indian OTT history. He has also appeared in Bollywood films after his massive OTT success.

name: Jim Sarbh
bio: Jim Sarbh is a talented Indian actor known for his powerful villain roles and intense performances. He gained recognition through Neerja and Padmaavat. He later appeared in the acclaimed series Rocket Boys portraying Homi Bhabha. He is considered one of the finest young actors in India.

name: Vikrant Massey
bio: Vikrant Massey is a talented Indian actor who rose to fame through A Suitable Boy and Mirzapur. He delivered a landmark performance in 12th Fail which became one of the most acclaimed films. He is known for his natural acting style and powerful screen presence.

name: Siddhant Chaturvedi
bio: Siddhant Chaturvedi is a young Bollywood actor who rose to fame with his scene stealing performance in Gully Boy. He has appeared in Gehraiyaan and Phone Bhoot. He is also a rapper and is known for his energetic personality and natural acting abilities.

name: Ishaan Khatter
bio: Ishaan Khatter is a young Bollywood actor and half brother of Shahid Kapoor. He made an impressive debut in Dhadak and delivered acclaimed performances in Beyond the Clouds and Khaali Peeli. He is known for his dancing abilities and intense acting style.

name: Ananya Panday
bio: Ananya Panday is a young Bollywood actress and daughter of actor Chunky Panday. She made her debut in Student of the Year 2 and has appeared in Gehraiyaan and Kho Gaye Hum Kahan. She is known for her social media presence and is one of the most followed young celebrities in India.
awards: Filmfare Award Best Female Debut Nomination

name: Alaya F
bio: Alaya F is a young Bollywood actress and granddaughter of actress Kabir Bedi. She made an impressive debut in Jawaani Jaaneman and has appeared in U Turn and Bade Miyan Chote Miyan. She is known for her dancing abilities and charming screen presence.

name: Rashmika Mandanna
bio: Rashmika Mandanna is known as the National Crush of India and is one of the biggest pan-India stars. She appeared in blockbusters like Pushpa Animal and Mission Majnu. She has worked across Telugu Kannada Tamil and Hindi films and has one of the largest fan followings in India.

name: Samantha Ruth Prabhu
bio: Samantha Ruth Prabhu is one of the biggest stars in South Indian cinema who has also made her mark in Bollywood. She delivered a landmark performance in the Pushpa item song Oo Antava and has appeared in the web series The Family Man 2. She is known for her versatility across multiple industries.

name: Esha Deol
bio: Esha Deol is a Bollywood actress and daughter of legendary actors Dharmendra and Hema Malini. She made her debut in Koi Mere Dil Se Pooche and has appeared in numerous films. She is known for her dancing abilities inherited from her mother.

name: Sonam Kapoor
bio: Sonam Kapoor is a Bollywood actress and daughter of Anil Kapoor known for her fashion sense and style. She delivered acclaimed performances in Neerja and The Zoya Factor. She is considered one of Bollywoods biggest fashion icons and is married to businessman Anand Ahuja.

name: Tabu
bio: Tabu is one of Bollywoods most acclaimed actresses known for her powerful and nuanced performances. She delivered landmark roles in Maachis Chandni Bar and Drishyam. She has won two National Film Awards and is known for her intense screen presence and dedication to her craft.
awards: National Film Award Best Actress 2 times

name: Manisha Koirala
bio: Manisha Koirala is a veteran actress from Nepal who became one of Bollywoods most popular stars in the 1990s. She delivered powerful performances in 1942 A Love Story Bombay and Dil Se. She is a cancer survivor and is known for her resilience and powerful acting abilities.

name: Raveena Tandon
bio: Raveena Tandon is a veteran Bollywood actress and National Film Award winner known for her powerful performances in Daman and Mohra. She made a comeback in KGF Chapter 2 playing a memorable villain. She is known for her bold roles and strong screen presence.

name: Urmila Matondkar
bio: Urmila Matondkar is a veteran Bollywood actress known for her iconic thriller performances in Rangeela Ram Gopal Varma Ki Aag and Kaun. She is known for her bold roles and powerful screen presence. She later entered politics and contested elections.

name: Revathi
bio: Revathi is a legendary South Indian actress who has appeared in Tamil Telugu Malayalam and Hindi films. She has won multiple National Film Awards and is known for her powerful and sensitive performances. She is also a director and has helmed acclaimed films.
awards: National Film Award Best Actress 2 times

name: Nayanthara
bio: Nayanthara known as the Lady Superstar is one of the biggest female stars in South Indian cinema. She has appeared in blockbusters across Tamil Telugu and Malayalam industries. She made her Bollywood debut in Jawan opposite Shah Rukh Khan and has established herself as a pan-India star.

name: Trisha Krishnan
bio: Trisha Krishnan is one of South Indias biggest female stars known for her versatile performances across Tamil and Telugu films. She has appeared in blockbusters like Ghilli Varsham and Ponniyin Selvan. She is known for her natural beauty and powerful acting abilities.

name: Prabhas
bio: Prabhas is one of Indias biggest pan-India superstars known for his iconic role in Baahubali which became one of the highest grossing Indian films ever. He has a massive fan following across India and internationally. He starred in Saaho and Kalki 2898 AD.

name: Mahesh Babu
bio: Mahesh Babu is one of the biggest superstars in Telugu cinema known as Prince of Tollywood. He has delivered blockbusters like Pokiri Dookudu and Srimanthudu. He has a massive fan following and is known for his charming looks and powerful action sequences.

name: Allu Arjun
bio: Allu Arjun known as the Stylish Star became a pan-India phenomenon with Pushpa The Rise. He won the National Film Award for Best Actor for Pushpa 2 The Rule which became the highest grossing Indian film ever. He is known for his exceptional dancing and powerful action sequences.

name: Ram Charan
bio: Ram Charan is one of Tollywoods biggest stars and son of megastar Chiranjeevi. He achieved global recognition through RRR directed by SS Rajamouli. RRR won multiple international awards and established Ram Charan as a global superstar. He is known for his powerful action sequences.

name: Jr NTR
bio: Jr NTR known as Young Tiger achieved global recognition through RRR alongside Ram Charan. He is known for his exceptional dancing skills and powerful performances. He has a massive fan following in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana and is one of the biggest stars in Telugu cinema.

name: Vijay
bio: Vijay known as Thalapathy is one of the biggest superstars in Tamil cinema with a massive fan following. He delivered blockbusters like Beast Varisu and Leo. He recently entered politics and his political party TVKP has become a major force in Tamil Nadu. He is loved for his dancing and action.

name: Ajith Kumar
bio: Ajith Kumar known as Thala is one of Tamil cinemas biggest superstars. He is known for his action films and his passion for motorsports. He has delivered blockbusters like Vedalam Viswasam and Thunivu. He is also a professional racing driver who has competed internationally.

name: Kamal Haasan
bio: Kamal Haasan is a legendary Indian actor director and writer considered one of the greatest performers in Indian cinema history. He has won four National Film Awards and has appeared in films across multiple languages. He is known for his method acting and has hosted Bigg Boss Tamil.
awards: National Film Award Best Actor 4 times

name: Rajinikanth
bio: Rajinikanth known as Superstar or Thalaivar is the biggest superstar in South Indian cinema and one of the most influential actors in world cinema. name: Mohanlal

name: Alexandra Daddario
birthPlace: New York City, New York, USA
bio: Alexandra Anna Daddario (born March 16, 1986) is an American actress. She had her breakthrough portraying Annabeth Chase in the Percy Jackson film series (2010–2013). She has since starred as Paige in Hall Pass (2011), Heather Miller in Texas Chainsaw 3D (2013), Blake Gaines in San Andreas (2015), Summer Quinn in Baywatch (2017), and Alexis Butler in We Summon the Darkness (2019). She has also guest starred in television series such as White Collar, It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia, True Detective, New Girl, and American Horror Story: Hotel. In 2021, she starred in the first season of the HBO series The White Lotus, for which she received widespread critical acclaim and an Emmy nomination for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Limited or Anthology Series or Movie in 2022.

name: Sidney Kibrick
bio:
Sidney Henry Kibrick (July 2, 1928 – January 2, 2026) was an American child actor primarily active in Hollywood of the 1930s, most notable for appearing in the Our Gang short subjects film series, featuring in more than two dozen, between 1933 and 1939. Kibrick was the last living actor who played a featured Our Gang character.

bio:
Zhang Linghe (张凌赫) is a Chinese actor born in Wuxi, Jiangsu December 30, 1997. He was admitted to Nanjing Normal University in 2016. In addition to joining the Aerospace Agency, due to his interest in physics, he majored in Electrical Engineer in the School of Electrical and Automation Engineering. A chance meeting and discussion with an agent during this time lead him to discover a significant interest in acting, which steered him to pursue entering the show business circle.

He debuted as an actor in the 2020 period drama series, 'Maiden Holmes'. On January 20, 2021, he won the "New Force of the Year" award at the 5th Jinguduo Network Film and Television Festival.

name: Mario Adorf
bio: Mario Adorf (born 8 September 1930) was an Italian-German film and stage actor, best known for his lead role in the 1978 film The Tin Drum.

name: Alain Delon
bio:
Alain Fabien Maurice Marcel Delon (8 November 1935 – 18 August 2024) was a French actor, film producer, screenwriter, singer, and businessman. Acknowledged as a cultural and cinematic leading man of the 20th century, Delon emerged as one of the foremost European actors of the late 1950s to the 1980s, and became an international sex symbol. He is regarded as one of the most well-known figures of the French cultural landscape. His style, looks, and roles, which made him an international icon, earned him enduring popularity.

Delon achieved critical acclaim for his roles in films such as Women Are Weak (1959), Purple Noon (1960), Rocco and His Brothers (1960), L'Eclisse (1962), The Leopard (1963), Any Number Can Win (1963), The Black Tulip (1964), The Last Adventure (1967), Le Samouraï (1967), The Girl on a Motorcycle (1968), La Piscine (1969), Le Cercle Rouge (1970), Un flic (1972), and Monsieur Klein (1976). Over the course of his career, Delon worked with many directors, including Luchino Visconti, Jean-Luc Godard, Jean-Pierre Melville, Michelangelo Antonioni, Louis Malle, and Agnès Varda.

Delon received many film and entertainment awards throughout his career. In 1985, he won the César Award for Best Actor for his performance in Notre histoire (1984). In 1991, he became a member of France's Legion of Honour. At the 45th Berlin International Film Festival, he won the Honorary Golden Bear. At the 2019 Cannes Film Festival, he received the Honorary Palme d'Or.

In addition to his acting career, Delon also recorded the spoken part in the popular 1973 song "Paroles, paroles", a duet with Dalida as the main singing voice. He acquired Swiss citizenship in 1999.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Alain Delon, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Yoon Yool
bio: Yoon Yul is a South Korean AV actress.

name: John Nolan
bio: John Francis Nolan was a British actor known for his roles as John Greer in Person of Interest. He was also the uncle of Christopher and Johnathan Nolan.

name: Ed O'Neill
bio: Edward Leonard O'Neill (born April 12, 1946) is an American actor, comedian, and former football player. His best-known roles are Al Bundy on Married... with Children (1987–1997) and Jay Pritchett on Modern Family (2009–2020). Over his career, he has earned four Screen Actors Guild Awards as well as nominations for three Primetime Emmy Awards and two Golden Globe Awards.

name: Elle Fanning
bio:
Mary Elle Fanning (born April 9, 1998) is an American actress. As a child, she made her film debut as the younger version of her sister Dakota Fanning's character in the drama film I Am Sam (2001). She appeared in several other films as a child actress, including Daddy Day Care (2003), Babel (2006), The Curious Case of Benjamin Button and Phoebe in Wonderland (both 2008), and the miniseries The Lost Room (2006). She then had leading roles in Sofia Coppola's drama Somewhere (2010) and J. J. Abrams' science fiction film Super 8 (2011).

Fanning played Princess Aurora in the fantasy films Maleficent (2014) and Maleficent: Mistress of Evil (2019) while working in independent films such as Sally Potter's Ginger & Rosa (2012), Nicolas Winding Refn's The Neon Demon (2016), Mike Mills' 20th Century Women (2016), and Coppola's The Beguiled (2017). From 2020 to 2023, she starred as Catherine the Great in the Hulu period satire series The Great, for which she received nominations for a Primetime Emmy Award and two Golden Globe Awards. She has since portrayed Michelle Carter in the Hulu limited series The Girl from Plainville (2022), made her Broadway debut in the play Appropriate (2023), and played a character based on Suze Rotolo in the biographical drama A Complete Unknown (2024).

name: Ana de Armas
bio:
Ana Celia de Armas Caso (Spanish pronunciation:[ˈana ˈselja ðe ˈaɾmas ˈkaso]; born 30 April 1988) is a Cuban, American and Spanish actress. She began her career in Cuba with a leading role in the romantic drama Una rosa de Francia (2006). At 18, she moved to Madrid, Spain, and starred in the popular drama El Internado (2007–2010). After moving to Los Angeles, de Armas had English-speaking roles in the psychological thriller Knock Knock (2015) and the comedy-crime film War Dogs (2016).

De Armas rose to prominence for her roles as the holographic AI Joi in the science fiction film Blade Runner 2049 (2017) and nurse Marta Cabrera in the mystery film Knives Out (2019), receiving a  Golden Globe Award nomination for Best Actress – Motion Picture Comedy or Musical. She then played Bond girl Paloma in the James Bond film No Time to Die (2021) and actress Marilyn Monroe in the biographical drama Blonde (2022), for which she became the first Cuban nominated for the Academy Award for Best Actress. She then led the action thriller Ballerina (2025), a spin-off instalment in the John Wick franchise.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Ana de Armas, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Daniel Vegas
bio: Daniel Vegas is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Hannah Cheramy
bio: Hannah was born in Vancouver, BC. She began acting in local children's theatre productions by the age of 7. Hannah found her agent when she was 11 years old and in the first year she was booked in numerous commercials and was cast as a lead in a horror feature film. Since then, she has been cast in TV movies, TV series, feature films and is now a series regular on the TV series "From".

name: Min Do-yoon
bio: The play started with a child actor, and he belonged to the drama club even in high school. Started full-scale actor business at the age of 27. He has a well-trained body and many villains have a strong image, but he is also good at comical roles. He is learning Japanese and aiming for activities in Japan. Major appearances include "Forbidden Sex", "Yongjugol", and "Studio 2.0"

name: Angela Pleasence
bio: Daphne Anne Angela Pleasence, better known as Angela Pleasence, was an English actress. Trained in theatre, Pleasence's first major film role came in Hitler: The Last Ten Days, followed by roles in horror films such as From Beyond the Grave and Symptoms.

name: Gong Xuehua
bio: Gong Xuehua (宫雪花), also known as Jiang Xun (江迅), is a Chinese actress and former beauty queen.

name: Karl Urban
bio: Karl-Heinz Urban (born 7 June 1972) is a New Zealand actor. His career began with appearances in New Zealand films and TV series such as Xena: Warrior Princess. His first Hollywood role was in the 2002 horror film Ghost Ship. Since then, he has starred in many high-profile movies, including as Éomer in the second and third instalments of The Lord of the Rings trilogy, Vaako in the second and third instalments of the Riddick film series, Leonard McCoy in the Star Trek reboot film series, Kirill in The Bourne Supremacy (2004), John "Reaper" Grimm in Doom (2005), Judge Dredd in Dredd (2012), Gavin Magary in Pete's Dragon (2016), and Skurge in Marvel Studios' Thor: Ragnarok (2017). In 2013, he starred in the sci-fi series Almost Human. Since 2019, he has starred as Billy Butcher in Amazon's superhero series streaming on television, The Boys.

name: Megan Fox
bio:
Megan Denise Fox (born May 16, 1986) is an American businesswoman, entrepreneur, model, actress, producer, director, writer and host. She made her acting debut in the family film Holiday in the Sun (2001), which was followed by numerous supporting roles in film and television, such as the teen musical comedy Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen (2004), as well as a starring role in the ABC sitcom Hope & Faith (2004–2006). Her breakout role was as Mikaela Banes in the blockbuster action film Transformers (2007), which she reprised in its sequel Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009). She also portrayed the titular character in the horror comedy Jennifer's Body (2009), starred as April O'Neil in the superhero action film Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014) and its sequel Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016), and starred as Reagan Lucas in the fifth and sixth seasons of the Fox sitcom New Girl (2016–2017).

Fox has also made appearances in numerous magazines such as Maxim, Rolling Stone, and FHM. She is the recipient of several accolades, including two Scream Awards and four Teen Choice Awards.

name: Minami Hamabe
bio: Minami Hamabe (born August 29, 2000) is a Japanese actress. She is one of Japan's most prominent figures in the modern-day entertainment industry. Hamabe gained widespread fame for her role in Japan for her role in the live-action film Let Me Eat Your Pancreas (2017). She gained more of a worldwide fame with her role and performance in Takashi Yamazaki's Godzilla Minus One (2023).

name: Evan Adams
bio: Evan Adams is a rising actor well-known for his roles in some of ReelShort's vertical mini-series like 'Summer Situationship' (2025) and 'The Bad Boy Who Ruined Me' (2025).

name: Stephan Tölle
bio: Stephan Tölle is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Jensen Ackles
bio: Jensen Ross Ackles (born March 1, 1978) is a European-American actor, producer, director and singer. He is most notable for his television role as Dean Winchester on the CW television series Supernatural. His other popular roles include Soldier Boy on the popular Amazon Prime original series The Boys, Eric Brady in Days of our Lives which earned him several Daytime Emmy Award nominations, Alec/X5-494 in Dark Angel, and Jason Teague in Smallville.

name: Mila Kunis
birthPlace: Chernovtsy, Ukrainian SSR, USSR [now Chernivtsi, Ukraine]
bio:
Milena Markovna "Mila" Kunis (born August 14, 1983) is a Ukrainian and American actress. Born in Chernivtsi, Ukraine, and raised in Los Angeles, Kunis began playing Jackie Burkhart on the Fox television series That '70s Show (1998–2006) at the age of 15. She has voiced Meg Griffin on the Fox animated series Family Guy since 1999.

Kunis's breakout film role was in the 2008 romantic comedy Forgetting Sarah Marshall. She gained further critical acclaim and accolades for her performance in the psychological thriller Black Swan (2010), receiving nominations for the SAG Award and the Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress. Her other major films include the action films Max Payne (2008) and The Book of Eli (2010), the romantic comedy Friends with Benefits (2011), the fantasy film Oz the Great and Powerful (2013) as the Wicked Witch of the West, and the comedies Ted (2012), Bad Moms (2016) and its sequel, A Bad Moms Christmas (2017).

name: Veronika Zhuravleva
bio: Veronika Zhuravleva is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Chikako Aoyama
bio: Japanese actor, color psychotherapist, and a native of Osaka Prefecture. In 1989, Chikko Aoyama played a role in the movie "Sentamako". In 1999, Chikko Aoyama obtained qualifications as a color psychotherapy consultant and teacher in the United Kingdom, and has qualifications as a color blender and JAA aroma therapist in Japan, but is now active in Japan as a color psychotherapist. She appeared in many restricted movies in her early stage, mainly showing her perfect figure and glamorous look. In the early 1990s, she starred in the Hong Kong films "Female Robot" and "Breaking Out", as well as a guest star in "When the King Comes Back". In the same period, he published the beautiful art photo album "Subtropical Climate" and "Subtropical Climate".

name: Stephanie Cayo
bio:
Stephanie Cristina Cayo Sanguinetti (born April 8, 1988) is a Peruvian actress, singer and songwriter.

She gained recognition as a leading lady in the youth telenovela Besos robados. She is known in Colombia for participating in productions such as La Marca del Deseo, Doña Bella, La Secretaria and later starred in La Hipocondríaca.

name: Anthony Timpano
bio: Anthony Timpano is an actor, known for A Score to Settle (2019), There's Someone Inside Your House (2021) and Mixtape (2021).

name: Wen Zhicheng
bio: Wen Zhicheng is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Cecilia Cheung
birthPlace: Hong Kong, British Crown Colony [now China]
bio: Cecilia Cheung Pak-chi (Chinese: 張栢芝, born 24 May 1980) was born in Hong Kong to a Chinese father and a half Chinese-half British mother. Her parents divorced when she was just a child after which she was sent to Australia to live with her aunt at the age of fourteen. She has an elder half-sister Dai Pek-Chi, two younger brothers and a younger half-brother from her father's side.

name: Kazumi Kawai
bio: Actress.

name: Kim Sun-young
bio: Kim Sun-young is a South Korean actress and singer best known for her roles in the Korean films The Chaser, Love Lesson, Cutie, and Female War: A Nasty Deal.

name: Woo Do-hwan
bio:
Woo Do Hwan is a South Korean actor managed by KEYEAST. He is a former student at Dankook University in the Faculty of Performing Arts, Theater Major.

He debuted in 2011 with an appearance in the drama "Come, Come, Absolutely Come". His first lead role came in the 2017 series"Save Me".

He received the Best New Actor award at the 2017 KBS Drama Awards for his role in the series "Mad Dog". In 2018, at the MBC Drama Awards, he received an "Excellence Award" in the category "Actor in a Monday-Tuesday Drama" for his role in "Tempted".

He enlisted for his mandatory military service on July 6th, 2020, and was discharged on January 5th, 2022.

On July 10, 2023 it was announced that he has signed an exclusive contract with H& Entertainment after parting ways with KeyEast.

name: Takahisa Zeze
bio: Takahisa Zeze (瀬々敬久 Zeze Takahisa, born in 1960) is a Japanese film director and screenwriter best known for his pink films of the 1990s. Along with fellow directors, Kazuhiro Sano, Toshiki Satō and Hisayasu Sato, he is known as one of the "Four Heavenly Kings of Pink".

name: Aditya Dhar
bio: Aditya Dhar (born 12 March 1983) is an Indian director, screenwriter, producer and lyricist who works in Hindi cinema. He made his directorial debut with the 2019 war film Uri: The Surgical Strike, which was a critical and commercial success, becoming the 4th highest-grossing Indian film of the year and earning Dhar the National Film Award for Best Direction. He then directed the Dhurandhar series (2025-2026), a spy action thriller duology; both films in the series emerged as being among the highest-grossing Indian films of all time, earning Dhar widespread recognition across the Indian film industry. Dhar's films are known for their nationalistic themes, which have divided critics; commentators have contrastingly described his works as patriotic or propagandistic.

name: Hitoe Ootake
bio: Hitoe Ootake is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Vinta Morgan
bio: Vinta Morgan is an Actor, Writer and Producer. Vinta has appeared in Coronation Street since February 2021 as Ronnie Bailey. He has also appeared in The Bill, The Sight, Casualty, Doctors, Silent Witness, EastEnders, 50 Ways To Kill Your Lover, I Want My Wife Back, Butterfly, Ted Lasso, The Irregulars and Unforgotten.

name: Joe Pasquale
bio:
Comedian Joe Pasquale has continued to delight audiences with his live stand-up tours for over 30 years. Along the way he’s voiced characters for Hollywood movies Garfield:  A Tale of Two Kittens; Horton Hears A Who! Children’s television animation – Frankenstein’s Cat and starred in The Muppets’ 25th Anniversary show.

Joe made his theatrical debut in 1999 in Larry Shue’s The Nerd which prompted Time Out to describe his performance as “rib-shatteringly funny” and went on to appear in the touring productions of Tom Stoppard’s Rosencrantz and Guildenstern  Are Dead in 2004; Mel Brooks’  The Producers in 2007; The Wizard of Oz in 2010, Doctor in the House with Robert Powell in 2012; Ha Ha Holmes – The Hound Of The Baskervilles in 2013; (2013-2015) in the West End and touring production of ‘Spamalot’ in the starring role of ‘King Arthur’ and most recently (Spring/Summer 2018) Joe starred in the lead role of Frank Spencer in the new touring production of ‘Some Mother Do ‘Ave ‘Em’ which will see a return to UK theatres in Spring/Summer 2020.

Added to this Joe was crowned King of the Jungle in ITV’s I’m A Celebrity… Get Me Out Of Here in 2004; starred in ITV’s Dancing on Ice in 2013; dangled from the ceiling of the London Palladium(!) in 2016 and 2017 for ITV’s Live From the Palladium; taken part in ITV’s Sugar Free Farm; appeared on 5 Royal Variety Performances and most recently, took part in ITV1’s ‘The All New Monty: Who Bares Wins’ for Stand Up To Cancer and has become a mainstay of the British Pantomime season with sold out performances each and every Christmas, with this coming Christmas seeing him perform as Wishee Washee in Aladdin at the Milton Keynes Theatre!

name: Morena Baccarin
birthPlace: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
bio:
Morena Baccarin (born June 2, 1979) is a Brazilian-born American actress most widely known for roles in several American science fiction television shows: as Inara Serra in the series Firefly; as Adria in the series Stargate SG-1; and as Anna in the 2009 version of the series V.

Baccarin was born in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Her mother is Brazilian stage and TV actress Vera Setta, and her father is Italian journalist Fernando Baccarin. When she was 7, Baccarin moved with her family to Greenwich Village, New York, as her father was transferred to Globo TV's headquarters in the United States, working as editor. Baccarin attended Public School 41 and New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies, where she and Claire Danes were classmates. She later attended the Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts before she entered the theater program at Juilliard. Baccarin landed her first movie role in the improvised fashion world comedy Perfume (2001).

name: Aditya Chopra
bio: Aditya Chopra is an Indian filmmaker. His work as a director includes Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge (1995), Mohabbatein (2000), Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi (2008) and Befikre (2016).

name: Jacob Elordi
bio:
Jacob Elordi (born 26 June 1997) is an Australian actor. After moving to Los Angeles in 2017 to pursue an acting career, he gained prominence with his role as Noah Flynn, the bad boy love interest, in Netflix's The Kissing Booth film series (2018–2021). He also became known for his role as troubled high school football player Nate Jacobs in HBO's teen drama series Euphoria (2019–present). In 2023, he starred as Elvis Presley in the biographical film Priscilla and as a wealthy university student in Saltburn, which earned him a nomination for the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jacob Elordi, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Dyessa Garcia
bio: Dyessa Garcia is a Filipino actress and singer-songwriter who rose to prominence through her work with the streaming platform Vivamax. She began her career in the entertainment industry by participating in various amateur singing contests before transitioning into acting in 2023. Known for her roles in adult-oriented dramas (the "sexy-drama" genre), she has starred in numerous films, including Init (2024), Donselya (2024), and Dilig (2024).  In addition to her film career, she is a recording artist under Vicor Music. Her music style is described as slow pop/rock, and she made her debut with the ballad "Tanggap Ko Na" in 2024.

name: Antony Starr
bio:
Antony Starr (born October 25, 1975) is a New Zealand actor, known for his television roles. He played the dual roles of Jethro and Van West on Outrageous Fortune (2005–2010), Lucas Hood on Banshee (2013–2016), and Homelander on The Boys (2019–present).

For his role in the 2012 Australian film Wish You Were Here, Starr won the AACTA Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role, among other accolades. He was nominated for the New Zealand Film Award for Best Actor for his performance in After the Waterfall (2010).

name: Jean-Claude Van Damme
bio:
Van Damme was born Jean-Claude Camille François van Varenberg in Berchem-Sainte-Agathe, Brussels, Belgium, to Eliana and Eugène van Varenberg, an accountant. “The Muscles from Brussels” started martial arts at the age of eleven. His father introduced him to martial arts when he saw his son was physically weak. At the age of 12, van Damme began his martial arts training at Centre National De Karate (National Center of Karate) under the guidance of Master Claude Goetz in Ixelles, Belgium. Van Damme trained for 4 years and earned a spot on the Belgium Karate Team. He won the European professional karate association's middleweight championship as a teenager, and also beat the 2nd best karate fighter in the world. His goal was to be number one but got sidetracked when he left his hometown of Brussels.

In 1976 at the age of sixteen, Jean-Claude started his Martial Arts fight career. Jean-Claude retired from martial arts in 1982, following a knockout over Nedjad Gharbi in Brussels, Belgium. Jean-Claude posted a 18-1 (18 knockouts) kickboxing record, and a semi-contact record of 41-4.  He came to Hong Kong at the age of 19 for the first time and felt insured to do action movies in Hong Kong. In 1981, van Damme moved to Los Angeles. He took English classes while working as carpet layer, pizza delivery man, limo driver, and thanks to Chuck Norris he got a job as a bouncer at a club. Norris gave van Damme a small role in the movie Missing in Action (1984), but it wasn't good enough to get anybody's attention. In 1984, he got his first significant role as a villain named Ivan in the low-budget movie, No Retreat, No Surrender (1986). Then one day, while walking on the streets, Jean-Claude spotted a producer for Cannon Pictures and showed some of his martial arts abilities which led to a role in Bloodsport (1988). The movie, filmed in Hong Kong, was so bad when it was completed, it was shelved for almost two years. It might have never been released if van Damme did not help them to re-cut the film and begged producers to release it. They finally released the film, first in Malaysia and France and then into the US shot on a meager 1.5 million dollar budget, it became a US box-office hit in the spring of 1988. It made about 30 million worldwide and audiences supported this film for its new sensational action star, Jean-Claude van Damme.

His good looks led to starring roles in higher budgeted movies like Cyborg (1989), AWOL: Absent Without Leave (1990), Double Impact (1991) and Universal Soldier (1992). In 1994, he scored with his big breakthrough $100 million worldwide hit Timecop (1994). But in the meantime, his personal life was coming apart. A divorce, followed by a new marriage, followed by another divorce. It began to show up in his career when his projects began to tank at the box office: The Quest (1996), which he directed; Maximum Risk (1996) and Double Team (1997). The three films made less than $50 million combined. In 1999, he remarried his ex-wife, Gladys Portugues, and restarted his lost career to attain new goals. With help from his family, he faced his problems and made movies like Replicant (2001), Derailed (2002), and In Hell (2003).

name: Julie Anne Robinson
bio: Julie Anne Robinson (born August 8, 1945) is a British theatre, television, film director and producer based in the United States and United Kingdom.

name: Timothée Chalamet
birthPlace: Manhattan, New York City, New York, USA
bio:
Timothée Hal Chalamet (born December 27, 1995) is an American actor.

He began his career in television, appearing in the series Homeland. In 2014, he made his film debut in Men, Women & Children and appeared in Interstellar.

In 2017, he had a leading role in Call Me by Your Name. He later appeared in Lady Bird (2017), Beautiful Boy (2018), and Little Women (2019).

He has since taken on leading roles in Dune (2021–2026) and Wonka (2023), and appeared in A Complete Unknown (2024) and Marty Supreme (2025).

name: Millie Bobby Brown
bio:
Millie Bonnie Bongiovi (born 19 February 2004), a British actress, is professionally known as Millie Bobby Brown. She gained recognition for playing Eleven in the Netflix science fiction series Stranger Things (2016–2025), for which she received nominations for two Primetime Emmy Awards. Brown has starred in the monster film Godzilla: King of the Monsters (2019) and its sequel Godzilla vs. Kong (2021). She also starred in and produced the Netflix films Enola Holmes (2020), Enola Holmes 2 (2022), and Damsel (2024).

In 2018, Brown was featured in the Time 100 list of the world's most influential people and appointed a UNICEF Goodwill Ambassador, the youngest person ever selected for this position.

name: Mark Wahlberg
bio:
Mark Robert Michael Wahlberg (born June 5, 1971), formerly known by his stage name Marky Mark, is an American actor and former rapper. His work as a leading man spans the comedy, drama, and action genres. He has received multiple accolades, including a BAFTA Award, and nominations for two Academy Awards, three Golden Globe Awards, and nine Primetime Emmy Awards.

Wahlberg was born in Boston. As a youth, he took part in a number of violent and racially motivated attacks. He gained fame as a member of the hip hop group Marky Mark and the Funky Bunch in the 1990s, with whom he released the albums Music for the People (1991) and You Gotta Believe (1992). Wahlberg made his screen debut in Renaissance Man (1994) and had his first starring role in Fear (1996). He received critical praise for his performance as porn actor Dirk Diggler in Boogie Nights (1997).

In the early 2000s, Wahlberg ventured into big-budget action movies, such as The Perfect Storm (2000), Planet of the Apes (2001), and The Italian Job (2003). He was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for playing a police officer in the crime drama The Departed (2006). Wahlberg was nominated for the Golden Globe Award for Best Actor for portraying Micky Ward in the sports drama biopic The Fighter (2010); as co-producer, he was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Picture. During the 2010s, he landed successful comedy roles with The Other Guys (2010), Ted (2012), Ted 2 (2015), Daddy's Home (2015), and Daddy's Home 2 (2017). Wahlberg also starred in the Transformers franchise films Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014) and Transformers: The Last Knight (2017). He was the world's highest-paid actor in 2017.

Wahlberg served as executive producer of five HBO series: the comedy-drama Entourage (2004–2011), the period crime drama Boardwalk Empire (2010–2014), the comedy-dramas How to Make It in America (2010–2011) and Ballers (2015–2019), and the documentary McMillions (2020). He is co-owner of the Wahlburgers chain and co-starred in the reality TV series about it. Wahlberg received a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in 2010.

name: Yda Manzano
bio: Yda Manzano is a Filipino actress who appeared in several films in the late 1990s and early 2000s, including May Sayad (1998) and Sa Iyong Mga Haplos (2001). Known for her work in drama and suspense genres, she established herself as a recognizable face in Philippine cinema during that period. In recent years, she has remained active in television and entertainment, continuing to contribute to the local industry.

name: Aika Yukihira
bio: Yukihira Aika is a Japanese actress and assistant director.

name: Mckenna Grace
bio:
Mckenna Grace (born June 25, 2006) is an American actress and singer. Born in Grapevine, Texas, she began acting professionally at age five and relocated to Los Angeles, California, as a child. Her earliest roles included Jasmine Bernstein in the Disney XD sitcom Crash & Bernstein (2012–2014) and Faith Newman in the soap opera The Young and the Restless (2013–2015). After several small roles, she starred as a child prodigy in Gifted (2017), a breakthrough for which she received a nomination for the Critics' Choice Movie Award for Best Young Performer.

Grace subsequently appeared in the films I, Tonya (2017), Troop Zero (2019), and Captain Marvel (2019). During this time, she appeared in several horror projects, including The Bad Seed (2018), The Haunting of Hill House (2018), and Annabelle Comes Home (2019). For playing the abused teenager Esther Keyes in The Handmaid's Tale (2021–2022), Grace was nominated for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series, making her the first child recognized for a guest acting Emmy. She appeared in the supernatural comedy films Ghostbusters: Afterlife (2021) and Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire (2024) as Phoebe Spengler, receiving critical praise and a Critics' Choice Super Award nomination. In 2022, Grace wrote, executive produced, and starred in The Bad Seed Returns, and portrayed Jan Broberg in A Friend of the Family.

After signing with Photo Finish Records in 2020, Grace released her debut single, "Haunted House", in 2021, as part of the Ghostbusters: Afterlife soundtrack. She released two extended plays in 2023: Bittersweet 16 and Autumn Leaves, which explored pop rock and folk sounds, respectively.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Mckenna Grace, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Shu Qi
bio: Lin Li-hui, better known by her stage name Shu Qi  (Chinese: 舒淇; pinyin: Shū Qí), is a Taiwanese actress and model. She has also been credited as Hsu Chi and Shu Kei.

name: Choi Hyun-wook
bio: Choi Hyun-wook is a South Korean actor under GoldMedalist. He graduated from Hanlim Multi Arts School in 2019.  In 2019, he began his acting career by leading in the web drama Real:Time:Love. His role in SBS television series Taxi Driver and Racket Boys awarded him the Best New Actor at the 2021 SBS Drama Awards. Recently, Choi Hyun-wook gained more recognition in the tvN drama Twenty-Five Twenty-One, Wavve's Weak Hero Class 1, and Netflix's D.P. 2.

name: Caleb Ellsworth-Clark
bio: Caleb Ellsworth-Clark is a Canadian stage and screen actor.

name: William Daniels
bio: William David Daniels (born March 31, 1927) is an American actor and former president of the Screen Actors Guild (1999 to 2001). He is known for his performance as Dustin Hoffman's father in The Graduate (1967), as John Adams in 1776, as Carter Nash in Captain Nice, as Mr. George Feeny in ABC's Boy Meets World, as the voice of KITT in Knight Rider, and as Dr. Mark Craig in St. Elsewhere, for which he won two Emmy Awards.

name: Milla Jovovich
bio:
Milla Jovovich (born December 17, 1975) is an American actress, supermodel, musician, and fashion designer of Ukrainian descent. She was born in Kiev, Ukrainian SSR, USSR. In essence, she began in a number of science fiction and action films, for which the music channel VH1 called her "the reigning royal of strikes."

She has appeared on the cover of more than a hundred magazines, and has also starred in films such as The Fifth Element (1997), Ultraviolet (2006), and the 'Resident Evil' franchise. Jovovich began modeling at eleven, when Richard Avedon featured her in Revlon's "Most Unforgettable Women in the World" advertisements, and she continued her career with other campaigns for L'Oréal cosmetics, Banana Republic, Christian Dior, Donna Karan, and Versace.

In 1988, she had her first professional acting role in the television film The Night Train to Kathmandu, and later that year she appeared in her first feature film, Two Moon Junction. Following more small television appearances such as the "Fair Exchange" (1989) and a 1989 role as a French girl (she was 14 at the time then) on a Married with Children episode and film roles, she gained notoriety with the romance film Return to the Blue Lagoon (1991). She appeared in 1993's Dazed and Confused alongside Ben Affleck and Matthew McConaughey. Jovovich then acted alongside Bruce Willis in the science fiction film The Fifth Element (1997), and later played the title role in The Messenger: The Story of Joan of Arc (1999). In 2002, she starred in the video game adaptation Resident Evil, which spawned five sequels: Resident Evil: Apocalypse (2004), Resident Evil: Extinction (2007), Resident Evil: Afterlife (2010), Resident Evil: Retribution (2012) and Resident Evil: The Final Chapter (2016).

In addition to her modelling and acting career, Jovovich released a music album, The Divine Comedy in 1994. She continues to release demos for other songs on her official website and contributes to film soundtracks as well; Jovovich has yet to release another album. In 2003, she and model Carmen Hawk created the clothing line Jovovich-Hawk, which ceased operations in early 2008. In its third season prior to its demise, the pieces could be found at Fred Segal in Los Angeles, Harvey Nichols, and over 50 stores around the world.

name: George Grossmith
bio:
George Grossmith Jr. (11 May 1874 – 6 June 1935) was a British actor, theatre producer and manager, director, playwright and songwriter, best remembered for his work in and with Edwardian musical comedies. Grossmith was also an important innovator in bringing "cabaret" and "revues" to the London stage. Born in London, he took his first role on the musical stage at the age of 18 in Haste to the Wedding (1892), a West End collaboration between his famous songwriter and actor father and W. S. Gilbert.

Grossmith soon became an audience favourite playing "dude" roles. Early appearances in musicals included George Edwardes's hit A Gaiety Girl in 1893, and Go-Bang and The Shop Girl in 1894. In 1895, Grossmith left the musical stage, instead appearing in straight comedies, but after a few years he returned to performing in musicals and Victorian burlesques. Early in the new century, he had a string of successes in musicals for Edwardes, including The Toreador (1901), The School Girl (1903), The Orchid (1903), The Spring Chicken (1905), The New Aladdin (1906), The Girls of Gottenberg (1907), Our Miss Gibbs (1909), Peggy (1911), The Sunshine Girl (1912) and The Girl on the Film (1913). The lanky Grossmith was often comically paired with the diminutive Edmund Payne. At the same time, he developed a reputation as a co-writer of musicals and revues, usually adding jokes.

Grossmith soon established himself as a major producer, together with Edward Laurillard, of such hits as Tonight's the Night (1914), Theodore & Co (1916) and Yes, Uncle! (1917). He wrote the long-running revue series that began with The Bing Boys Are Here (1916), scheduling these projects around his naval service in World War I. He then produced Eastward Ho! (1919) and produced, co-wrote, directed and sometimes starred in, Kissing Time (1919), A Night Out (1920), Sally (1921), The Cabaret Girl (1922), The Beauty Prize (1923) and Primrose (1924), many of these featuring Leslie Henson. He also continued to appear in other producers' shows, including The Naughty Princess (1920) and No, No, Nanette (1925).

Later, he performed in such pieces as Princess Charming (1926) and appeared in at least ten films for London Film Productions Ltd., among other films, in the 1930s. He produced The Land of Smiles and Cavalcade (both in 1931), and in 1933, he played Touchstone in a production of As You Like It.

name: Zhao Lusi
bio: Zhao Lusi (Rosy Zhao) is a Chinese actress born on November 9, 1998, in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. She studied at Mingdao University in Taiwan and made her acting debut in 2017 with the romance drama Untouchable Lovers. Known for her vibrant charm and expressive performances, Zhao quickly rose to fame with leading roles in popular dramas such as The Romance of Tiger and Rose, Hidden Love, Love Like the Galaxy, and Who Rules the World. Her talent has earned her numerous accolades, including the "Breakthrough TV Actor of the Year" at the Tencent Video Star Awards and the "Best Actress Award" at the Hengdian Film and Television Awards. With her growing versatility and devoted fanbase, Zhao Lusi continues to be a standout figure in Chinese television and cinema.

name: Hande Erçel
bio:
Hande Erçel (born 24 November 1993) is a Turkish actress and model, known for her work in television and films. One of turkey's highest-paid actressess. After studying from the Mimar Sinan Fine Arts University, she started her early modeling career, where she won the title of Miss Turkey in 2012, following this, Erçel made her acting debut with a role of Zahide in tv series The Wren.

She gain popularity after playing Selin Yılmaz in Romance, comedy television series Güneşin Kızları for which she won the Rising Star of the Year at Golden Butterfly Awards. Erçel is best known for her roles in Romance series Aşk Laftan Anlamaz (2016–17) and Romantic comedy, Drama series Sen Çal Kapımı (2020) in which her performance was highly acclaimed and won several accolades including Golden Wings Awards for Best Actress of the Year respectively.

name: Isla Fisher
bio:
Isla Lang Fisher (/ˈaɪlə/; born 3 February 1976) is an Australian actress. Born in Oman to Scottish parents who moved with her to Australia during her childhood, she began appearing in television commercials. She became prominent for her portrayal of Shannon Reed on the Australian soap opera Home and Away (1994–1997), for which she received two Logie Award nominations.

Fisher transitioned to Hollywood with a supporting role in the comedy horror film Scooby-Doo (2002) and has since starred in films such as Wedding Crashers (2005), Wedding Daze (2006), Confessions of a Shopaholic (2009), Bachelorette (2012), The Great Gatsby (2013), Now You See Me (2013), and Nocturnal Animals (2016). Her other credits include I Heart Huckabees (2004), Definitely, Maybe (2008), Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016), Tag (2018), and The Beach Bum (2019), in addition to voice roles in animated films such as Horton Hears a Who! (2008), Rango  (2011), Rise of the Guardians (2012), and Back to the Outback (2021).

Fisher had a recurring role in the fourth season of the sitcom Arrested Development(2013–2019) and has starred in the comedy-drama series Wolf Like Me since 2022. She has authored two young adult novels and the Marge in Charge book series. From 2010 to 2024, she married English comedian Sacha Baron Cohen, with whom she has three children.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Woody Harrelson, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Walter Kirney
birthPlace: Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York, USA
bio: Walter Kirney is an American professional wrestler better known by his ring name, Federico Palacios. He competes primarily on the American independent circuit in promotions such as the Ring of Honor, Jersey All Pro Wrestling. On June 23, 2011, Kirney made an appearance on Total Nonstop Action Wrestling's Impact Wrestling television show, working under the ring name Federico Paladios, competing with Dakota Darsow and Zema Ion in a three–way X Division match.

name: Lacey Bond
bio: Lacey Bond is a talented performer known for their work in film and television.

name: Amirah J
birthPlace: Washington, D.C., United States of America
bio:
Amirah J (born 2007) is an American actress from Washington, D.C., who is best known for her role as “Xan” in Shameless. She is one of the up-and-coming young talents on US television and has been working professionally as an actress since childhood.

Amirah began her acting career at around the age of eight. Her mother is Tiffanie Johnson and her father is a US Army veteran.

In Shameless (2018), she played Xan alongside Jeremy Allen White, William H. Macy, and Emmy Rossum. In High Potential (2024), she portrayed Ava, the daughter of the main character. In the short film How Not To Be a Junkie (2022), she took on the role of Katie, a complex teenage character—the film has won several awards.

Amirah J is also a cheerleader and competes as a “flyer” in competitions, which highlights her physical agility. She is known for her emotional expressiveness and her ability to portray intense roles credibly. Her mixed ethnic background shapes her identity and versatility as an actress.

name: Yang Mi
bio: Mini Yang, or more commonly known as Yang Mi (Chinese: 杨幂), is a Chinese actress most well-known for her roles in popular television series "The Return of the Condor Heroes", "Chinese Paladin 3", and "Palace". Her most notable film role to date is as Lin Xiao from the "Tiny Times" movie series. In 2013, she was named as the 7th most powerful celebrity on Forbes China Celebrity 100 list. In 2014, she married Hong Kong actor Hawick Lau, and gave birth to their daughter in June 2014.

name: Helene Vannari
bio:
Helene Vannari (March 20, 1948 – March 16, 2022) was an Estonian stage, radio, television and film actress.

Vannari was born in the town of Kilingi-Nõmme in Pärnu County. Her father was a forestry teacher and her mother was an archivist. She is one of two siblings, both girls. When Vannari was three-years-old, her family moved to Tartu, where she attended schools, including studying at the Vanemuine drama studio, graduating in 1966. At age seven, her father died and she was raised by her mother. In 1970, she graduated from the Tallinn State Conservatory, Performing Arts Department (now, the Estonian Academy of Music and Theatre). During her studies at the Tallinn State Conservatory, she met and befriended classmate Ene Järvis. The two would become lifelong friends.

name: Jack Black
bio:
Thomas Jacob Black (born August 28, 1969) is an American actor, comedian, and musician. He is known for his roles in family and comedy films and his voice work in animated films. His awards include a Children's and Family Emmy Award, a Grammy Award, and three Golden Globe Award nominations.

After portraying supporting roles in films including Dead Man Walking (1995), The Cable Guy (1996), Mars Attacks! (1996), and Enemy of the State (1998), Black had his breakout role in the musical film High Fidelity (2000). This led to larger roles in films like Shallow Hal (2001) and Orange County (2002) before he solidified his leading-man status with his starring role in School of Rock (2003). Black has since starred in King Kong (2005), The Holiday (2006), Nacho Libre (2006), Tropic Thunder (2008), Bernie (2011), Goosebumps (2016), and Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017), its sequel Jumanji: The Next Level (2019), The House with a Clock in Its Walls (2018) and A Minecraft Movie (2025). He has also voiced Po in the Kung Fu Panda franchise (2008–present) and Bowser in The Super Mario Bros. Movie franchise (2023–present). 

Black is the lead vocalist of the duo Tenacious D, which he formed in 1994 with long-time friend Kyle Gass. In 2015, they won the Grammy Award for best metal performance for "The Last in Line." Since 2018, Black has run a YouTube channel called Jablinski Games.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jack Black, licensed under CC-BY-SA; full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Madelyn Cline
bio:
Madelyn Cline (born December 21, 1997) is an American actress and model. She is best known for her roles in the Netflix teen drama series Outer Banks (2020–2026), in Rian Johnson's mystery film Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery (2022), and in the slasher film I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Madelyn Cline, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

name: Christine Bermas
bio:
Christine Bermas is a Filipino actress and model born on August 30, 2001, in Manila, Philippines. She began her career in entertainment as a member of the girl group Belladonnas before transitioning to acting in 2021. Christine gained recognition for her performances in Vivamax films such as Moonlight Butterfly (2022), Scorpio Nights 3 (2022), Island of Desire (2022), Relyebo (2022), Nightbird (2023), and Lampas Langit (2023).

Known for portraying daring and mature roles, she has often emphasized the difference between her on-screen persona and her real-life personality, describing herself as conservative off-camera. Before entering show business, she worked humble jobs, including selling local delicacies, to support her family.

Christine continues to build her reputation as one of Vivamax’s most prominent young actresses, with aspirations to take on more dramatic and emotionally challenging roles in Philippine cinema.

name: Bill Shirley
bio:
